title: Elaphoglossum yoshinagae
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum yoshinagae is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the wood fern family. It is a type of epiphytic fern, which means it grows on other plants or objects for support. The classification of Elaphoglossum yoshinagae is further divided into the genus Elaphoglossum, which consists of approximately 900 species of ferns. Elaphoglossum yoshinagae is native to East Asia and is often found in tropical and subtropical regions. This species of fern is typically found growing on trees and rocks in humid environments.
